title: Charcoal+
description: Adds coal piece, charcoal piece, and charcoal block
body:
# Charcoal+

This mod will simply adds coal piece, charcoal piece, and charcoal block for more efficient use of them as fuels.

Requires Fabric API

## Usage

- **Coal piece/charcoal piece** used as fuel in furnace to cook only 1 item.

- **Charcoal block** is equivalent to coal block. Used as fuel in furnace to cook 80 items, more efficient than using 10 charcoals to cook 80 items as it is crafted only from 9 charcoals. (same behavior as Coal Block)
- You can smelt stick and bamboo into charcoal piece. Smelting 8 sticks takes equal time as smelting 1 log. For bamboo, you can use 3 of them as fuel to smelt 1 bamboo into charcoal piece.

## Recipe

Coal
